name: OmopCoveragePayerPlanPeriodView
title: Coverage → payer_plan_period (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description:
FHIR Coverage captures a patient's insurance enrollment (payer, plan, coverage period, subscriber relationship). It maps to OMOP payer_plan_period, which records continuous enrollment under a specific health benefit plan from a given payer. Unlike clinical event tables, payer_plan_period carries no _type_concept_id; it is purely administrative. One active Coverage resource produces one payer_plan_period row. Overlapping or adjacent periods for the same person/payer may be collapsed.

Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP: produce a flat row keeping source codes per vocabulary. Stage 2 joins vocab.concept to resolve concept_ids.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Coverage.id; surrogate OMOP key derived (hash/sequence) downstream.

extension.valueString: surrogate key from hash/sequence/lookup of FHIR id

column.name: subject_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer person_id via the same ID mapping used by the Patient mapper.

extension.valueString: resolve PERSON reference; downstream maps to person_id

column.name: payer_plan_period_start_date
column.description: Coverage start date. If absent, use ETL epoch or earliest known date. NOT NULL in OMOP.

column.name: payer_plan_period_end_date
column.description: Coverage end date. If absent or open-ended, use 9999-12-31 or ETL end date. NOT NULL in OMOP.

column.name: payer
column.description: OMOP Payer vocabulary concept (vocabulary_id='Payer', domain_id='Payer'). Resolve Organization reference, map name to payer concept. Default: 0. If payor references Patient (self-pay), use concept_id 436.

extension.valueString: resolve payor[0] -> Organization.name -> OMOP Payer vocabulary lookup

column.name: payer_text
column.description: Verbatim payer name or identifier. Resolve Organization reference and extract Organization.name. Fallback to Reference.display. Truncate to 50 chars.

column.name: plan
column.description: Map Coverage.type to OMOP Plan vocabulary. No standard OMOP vocabulary maps directly to Coverage.type. Default: 0.

extension.valueString: map Coverage.type (v3-ActCode) to OMOP Plan vocabulary

column.name: plan_text
column.description: Plan name as it appears in source. Truncate to 50 chars.

extension.valueString: Use Coverage.type.text, or class entry where type.coding.code='plan'. Concatenate group+plan if both present.

column.name: sponsor
column.description: OMOP Sponsor vocabulary concept. The policyHolder (often the employer) is the sponsor. Default: 0.

extension.valueString: resolve policyHolder -> Organization.name -> OMOP Sponsor vocabulary lookup

column.name: sponsor_text
column.description: Sponsor name from policyHolder reference. Truncate to 50 chars.

column.name: family_text
column.description: The subscriber ID links all family members under the same policy. Truncate to 50 chars.
